title: T-008 — saved_filter_presets + dashboards_catalog schema (RPT-018, RPT-019, RPT-HOME) (12-REPORTING §15.1a, §15.2, §9.3)
prompt:
# T-008 — Saved filter presets + Dashboards catalog

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1a RPT-018 Save Filter Preset Modal (schema block at lines 1014-1025), §9.3 dashboards_catalog, §15.2 RPT-HOME catalog landing
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `saved_filter_presets` (P1 transactional) + `dashboards_catalog` (metadata-driven dashboards registry; replaces hardcoded RPT_CATALOG). Both org-scoped + RLS-FORCE + Wave0 org_id naming. dashboards_catalog seeds with the 10 P1 dashboards + 15 P2 stubs.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0085_reporting_presets_and_catalog.sql`:
   - `saved_filter_presets (id UUID PK, org_id UUID NOT NULL, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), dashboard_id TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, slug TEXT NOT NULL, filters JSONB NOT NULL, visibility TEXT CHECK in ('just_me','my_team') DEFAULT 'just_me', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), UNIQUE (org_id, user_id, dashboard_id, slug))` + RLS+FORCE + policy `org_id = app.current_org_id()`.
   - `dashboards_catalog (id TEXT PK, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, phase TEXT CHECK in ('P1','P2','P3'), required_role TEXT NOT NULL, feature_flag TEXT, metadata_schema JSONB, enabled_for_orgs UUID[], version TEXT DEFAULT 'v3.0', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())` — global reference (no org_id; gated by RBAC at the rule layer).
   - Seed 10 P1 dashboards (factory-overview, yield-by-line, yield-by-sku, qc-holds, oee-summary, inventory-aging, wo-status, shipment-otd, integration-health, rules-usage) + 15 P2 placeholders with `feature_flag='reporting.v2_dashboards'`.
2. Drizzle entries.
3. Server Actions `packages/reporting/src/actions/{save-preset,apply-preset,delete-preset}.ts` — require `rpt.preset.save` / `rpt.preset.delete` permission (T-001), zod-validate name (max 60 chars per RPT-018), slug derivation server-side, duplicate handling by overwrite branch (per RPT-018 spec).
4. Server Component query helper `getDashboardsCatalog(orgId)` reading dashboards_catalog filtered by feature_flag eval + enabled_for_orgs check.
5. Vitest contract test: (a) RLS isolation on saved_filter_presets, (b) UNIQUE constraint enforces (org, user, dashboard, slug), (c) team-visibility set without Manager+ role rejected, (d) catalog query returns only flag-on dashboards for a given org, (e) all 10 P1 dashboard ids present after seed.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0085_reporting_presets_and_catalog.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-presets.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-catalog.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/save-preset.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/apply-preset.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/delete-preset.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/dashboards-catalog.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/presets-and-catalog.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0085 runs, when tables are inspected, then saved_filter_presets has RLS+FORCE + UNIQUE (org_id, user_id, dashboard_id, slug); dashboards_catalog seed contains exactly 10 P1 rows with required_role + 15 P2 rows with feature_flag='reporting.v2_dashboards'.
2. Given two orgs save presets under their respective app.set_org_context sessions, when each lists presets, then cross-org leak test passes (zero leaks).
3. Given a user without Manager role attempts to save a preset with visibility='my_team', when the Server Action runs, then it returns `{ error: 'forbidden' }` and writes a report_access_audits row.
4. Given duplicate (org, user, dashboard, slug), when save-preset Server Action runs in default mode, then it returns `{ error: 'duplicate' }`; when called with overwrite=true (RPT-018 inline overwrite branch), then it UPDATEs the existing row.
5. Given dashboards_catalog query is called for an org where `reporting.v2_dashboards` flag is OFF, when result is checked, then P2 rows are filtered out (still present in DB, just hidden in result).
6. Given pg_policies for saved_filter_presets is inspected, when policies are listed, then they reference app.current_org_id() — no current_setting GUC.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/presets-and-catalog.test.ts` covers 6 ACs incl. RLS isolation + RBAC guard + flag-filtered catalog.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test presets-and-catalog`.
- GREEN: write migration + Drizzle + Server Actions + query helper.

## Risk red lines
- Do not name scope column tenant_id — Wave0 v4.3 mandates org_id (PRD §15.1a uses tenant_id label; override per Wave0 lock).
- Do not couple dashboards_catalog rows to org_id — global registry; gated by feature_flag + enabled_for_orgs array + RBAC at the rule layer.
- Do not allow `visibility='my_team'` save without Manager+ role check in Server Action (RBAC guardrail).
- Do not store the entire searchParams string as `filters` raw — must be zod-validated JSON shape per dashboard.metadata_schema.
- Do not let slug derivation accept raw user input — server-side slugify with allowlist [a-z0-9-]; deny anything else.
- Do not skip RLS+FORCE on saved_filter_presets.

pipeline_inputs.description: saved_filter_presets (org-scoped RLS+FORCE) + dashboards_catalog (global registry with 10 P1 + 15 P2 seeds) + 3 Server Actions for preset CRUD.
pipeline_inputs.details: saved_filter_presets enforces UNIQUE (org, user, dashboard, slug); team-visibility requires Manager+. dashboards_catalog is the metadata-driven catalog replacing hardcoded RPT_CATALOG. P2 rows filter by reporting.v2_dashboards flag.

Do not implement save_preset_modal UI here (T-026)
Do not implement scheduled_reports table here (T-024)

Given dashboards_catalog query is called for an org where reporting.v2_dashboards flag is OFF, when result is checked, then P2 rows are filtered out

Given edge and compliance cases are exercised, when each condition is triggered, then it returns {error:'forbidden'} and writes a report_access_audits row and cross-org leak test passes.
